description_long: This object is an old-style CRT television set placed on top of a wooden cabinet. The television features a bulky, deep body with a slightly curved, dark glass screen at the front, surrounded by a thick, matte black bezel. The sides and back of the television are angular and vented, typical of CRT designs, and the rear extends significantly backward. The cabinet below is rectangular, with a flat top surface supporting the television and two paneled doors with subtle, pixelated wood grain textures. The overall color palette is muted, with the television in dark gray and black tones, and the cabinet in olive-brown shades. No visible brand, control buttons, or input/output ports are apparent from any angle.
description: A bulky, dark gray CRT television sits atop a rectangular olive-brown wooden cabinet with paneled doors and a flat top.
description_view_0: The left side of the CRT television is visible, showing its deep, angular back and vented panel, with the cabinet's side and top also in view.
description_view_1: The front view displays the curved glass screen of the television, framed by a thick bezel, and the full face of the cabinet with two paneled doors.
description_view_2: The right side of the television is shown, mirroring the left with its deep, vented back, and the cabinet's side and top are visible.
description_view_3: The rear view highlights the television's wide, angular back and the flat top of the cabinet, with no screen or cabinet doors visible.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, matte black plastic bezel with no visible styling features
